scope.purpose: Govern Rotherham NT import where the Rotherham source and the existing target NT corpus do not share identical chapter/verse sequences.

importPolicy.alignedChapters: may import Rotherham directly into verse text objects
importPolicy.mismatchChapters: must use translation overlay or explicit merge/split adjudication

recommendedImplementation.resolverRequirement: scripture resolver must check translation overlay when requested translation/verse is absent from target verse array

Matthew.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

Mark.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

Luke.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

John.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

Acts.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

Romans.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

II Corinthians.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

James.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

III John.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

Revelation of John.recommendedImportStrategy: Use Rotherham translation overlay for mismatch chapters; direct verse-object import is safe only for aligned chapters.

nextWork.title: Implement Rotherham NT overlay importer
nextWork.description: Import aligned chapters directly, and store mismatch chapters in a chapter-level Rotherham overlay without changing the target NRSV verse sequence.

nextWork.title: Extend resolver for translation overlays
nextWork.description: When a requested translation verse is not present in the target verse array, look in chapter.translationVerses[translation].

nextWork.title: Add resolver smoke tests for omitted/source-only and target-only NT cases

importResult.targetSequencePolicy: NRSV target verse sequences unchanged; Rotherham mismatch chapters stored in translationOverlays.Rotherham
importResult.emptySourceRowsPolicy: empty Rotherham source rows treated as governed omissions and not imported as blank text
